title: Netanyahu says Israel can 'stand alone' after Biden arms warning
shortDescription: Netanyahu has vowed to enter Rafah to crush Hamas militants behind the Oct. 7 border attacks that triggered the Israel-Hamas war. Israel's operation has so far appeared to be limited in scope.

title: Biden, Trump produce split screen made for a wild 2024 election
shortDescription: With Trump in court, and Biden addressing antisemitism and the war in Gaza, a striking split screen this week captured the bizarre election of 2024.

title: World War II reference edited into White House briefing video | Fact check
shortDescription: The clip was digitally edited to add fabricated audio. The original video shows a reporter asking about Gaza, not World War II alliances,

title: Marjorie Taylor Greene is up for reelection this year.
shortDescription: The Georgia Congresswoman better known as "MTG" is up for reelection this year, and is expected to win.

title: OnPolitics: Barron Trump enters politics as GOP convention delegate
shortDescription: Trump's son Barron, an 18 year old who will graduate from high school this year, will have a formal role in the Republican National Convention.

title: Georgia's dramatic election law changes since 2020
shortDescription: Less than six months before November 2024, Georgia Gov. Brian Kemp OKs election law changes, adding to a slate of new provisions passed 2021.

title: Biden campaign team attacks Trump using Kendrick Lamar's 'Euphoria'
shortDescription: President Joe Biden's campaign team posted a video using Kendrick Lamar's diss track "Euphoria" to attack former president Donald Trump.

title: Federal appeals court rejects Hunter Biden's gun charge dismissal request
shortDescription: A federal appeals court refused Thursday to dismiss Hunter Biden's gun charges in Delaware, clearing the way for a June trial.

title: Who is Donald Trump's youngest son, Barron Trump?
shortDescription: Donald Trump and Melania Trump's son, Barron, largely stayed out of the spotlight while his father was in office, but now he is about to help with campaign efforts.

title: Pro-Trump banner added to photo of students at Ole Miss | Fact check
shortDescription: A "Trump won" banner was digitally added to the student protest image. The original photo shows the students holding a U.S. flag.

title: President Biden pauses Israel bomb shipments
shortDescription: In a CNN interview, President Joe Biden said that the U.S. is pausing bomb shipments to Israel as Israeli leaders plan to attack Rafah, where over one million refugees are sheltering.

title: Young voters share which presidential candidate has their votes
shortDescription: Queens, NY, overwhelmingly supported Biden in the 2020 presidential election, but young voters in the county aren't so sure about whom to vote for in 2024.

title: Trump and GOP slam Biden over pledge to keep weapons from Israel
shortDescription: Republicans quickly accused Biden of trying to placate college demonstrators and left-wing activists who support Palestinians.

title: Video shows Biden proposing tax increases on wealthy in 2020 | Fact check
shortDescription: The 2020 video shows Biden speaking to a specific individual who'd previously benefitted from tax cuts, not referring to the whole crowd.

title: Bipartisan efforts save Speaker Mike Johnson
shortDescription: Representative Marjorie Taylor Greene faced boos on the House floor in her efforts to oust Mike Johnson as Speaker of the House.

title: Tim Scott, other top Republicans won't commit to accept 2024 results
shortDescription: Top Republicans like Tim Scott are refusing to commit to accept 2024 election results, raising concerns over the potential for another Jan. 6

title: Barron Trump makes political debut as GOP convention delegate
shortDescription: The Republican Party of Florida selected Barron Trump to be an at large convention delegate in Milwaukee in July.

title: Trump trial replay: Stormy Daniels testimony done; judge rejects mistrial request
shortDescription: Catch up with the latest updates after porn star Stormy Daniels completed her testimony and Donald Trump's lawyers tried to block Karen McDougal from testifying.

title: The U.S. House elections are where the real battlegrounds play out
shortDescription: Arizona, Michigan and Pennsylvania are three key battleground states in the House of Representatives—and the presidency.
